Replenishment Results
ROWS
—
# Item Code ▲ Description ↕ Warehouse ↕ SOH ↕ Qty On Order ↕ Movement Class ↕ Avg Daily Demand ↕ Lead Time (Days) ↕ Safety Stock ↕ ROP ↕ ROQ ↕ Stock Days (Current) ↕ Stock Days + ROQ ↕ Order Value (USD) ↕ Remarks ↕
BUY (SOH + QOO) < ROP
SAFE (SOH + QOO) ≥ ROP
REVIEW Dead / Slow / Medium — use NFP form
CRITICAL REVIEW Insurance / Critical — engineering sign-off required
NO DEMAND No transaction history
ROP = ⌈Avg×LT + SS⌉  |  ROQ = ⌈max(Avg×RP + SS − SOH − QOO, 0)⌉ min 1 (BUY only)  |  Stock Days = (SOH+QOO)÷Avg
— Scroll ↕ within table · Use filters to narrow results
